name: Shenzhen Mahjong
author: Poki
description: Shenzhen Mahjong is a match-and-merge puzzle game with a cute twist! Slide adorable animal tiles up, down, left, or right to align and match identical pairs. Use your logic and creativity—sometimes the solution is hiding in plain sight! Clear all the tiles before time runs out, and don’t forget to use helpful power-ups when you’re stuck. Can you master every level and become a tile-matching pro? How to play Shenzhen Mahjong? Click or tap to select the tile. Hold and drag to move the tile. Who created Shenzhen Mahjong? Shenzhen Mahjong is created by Adgard. Play their other skill and arcade games on Poki: Merge and Double , Freecell Solitaire , Merge Mosaics , Pop It vs Spinner , Find The Candy , MadZOOng , Merge to Million , Mahjoctopus , and One Hundred Castles Solitaire ! How can I play Shenzhen Mahjong for free? You can play Shenzhen Mahjong for free on Poki. Can I play Shenzhen Mahjong on mobile devices and desktop? Shenzhen Mahjong can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
